scripts.qa:visual: npm run build && node scripts/run-with-local-server.mjs -- node scripts/design-qa-snapshots.mjs
scripts.qa:ui: node scripts/ui-contract-qa.mjs && node scripts/ui-runtime-coverage-qa.mjs && node scripts/ui-runtime-class-audit.mjs
scripts.qa:architecture: npm run qa:flow && npm run qa:ui && npm run qa:legacy && npm run qa:css && npm run qa:structure
scripts.qa:syntax: node --check src/app.js && node --check src/data.js && node --check src/mes_contracts.js && node --check src/mes_org_model.js && node --check src/production_structure_matrix_data.js && node --check src/production_structure_service.js && node --check src/ui_runtime_contracts.js && node --check src/validation.js && node --check scripts/build.mjs && node --check scripts/run-with-local-server.mjs && node --check scripts/shared-state-endpoint.mjs && node --check scripts/state-consistency-qa.mjs && node --check scripts/shared-state-functional-qa.mjs && node --check scripts/design-qa-snapshots.mjs && node --check scripts/planning-labor-functional-qa.mjs && node --check scripts/shift-master-board-functional-qa.mjs && node --check scripts/timesheet-functional-qa.mjs && node --check scripts/gantt-operational-layer-qa.mjs && node --check scripts/shift-operational-flow-functional-qa.mjs && node --check scripts/auth-functional-qa.mjs && node --check scripts/roles-functional-qa.mjs && node --check scripts/boot-performance-qa.mjs && node --check scripts/module-smoke-qa.mjs && node --check scripts/production-structure-matrix-qa.mjs && node --check scripts/flow-contract-qa.mjs && node --check scripts/ui-contract-qa.mjs && node --check scripts/ui-runtime-coverage-qa.mjs && node --check scripts/ui-runtime-class-audit.mjs && node --check scripts/legacy-inventory.mjs && node --check scripts/css-layer-audit.mjs
scripts.qa:functional:inner: npm run qa:state:inner && npm run qa:shared-state && npm run qa:module-smoke:inner && npm run qa:planning-labor:inner && npm run qa:shift-master-board:inner && npm run qa:timesheet:inner && npm run qa:gantt-operational:inner && npm run qa:shift-flow:inner && npm run qa:auth:inner && npm run qa:roles:inner && npm run qa:boot:inner
scripts.qa:stabilize: npm run qa:syntax && npm run qa:architecture && git diff --check && npm run build
scripts.qa:nonvisual: npm run qa:stabilize && npm run qa:functional
scripts.qa:night: npm run qa:stabilize && npm run qa:functional && npm run qa:visual
